title: salix × cornuaultii
intro: Salix × cornuaultii, also known as Cornish willow or Cornish white willow, is a hybrid species of willow tree, derived from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving compounds, which are derived from its bark. The health benefits of Salix × cornuaultii include relieving menstrual cramps, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as supporting cardiovascular health and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Salix × cornuaultii include decoctions, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
